question: Có bao nhiêu bệnh nhân trong hệ thống?
expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_patients FROM patients;
generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_patients FROM patients

question: Có bao nhiêu bệnh nhân theo giới tính?
expected_sql: SELECT gender, COUNT(*) AS total FROM patients GROUP BY gender ORDER BY total DESC;
generated_sql: SELECT gender, COUNT(*) AS total FROM patients GROUP BY gender ORDER BY total DESC

question: Top 10 thành phố có nhiều bệnh nhân nhất là gì?
expected_sql: SELECT city, state, COUNT(*) AS total_patients FROM patients GROUP BY city, state ORDER BY total_patients DESC LIMIT 10;
generated_sql: SELECT city, state, COUNT(*) AS total_patients FROM patients GROUP BY city, state ORDER BY total_patients DESC LIMIT 10

question: Có bao nhiêu lượt khám theo từng loại encounter?
expected_sql: SELECT encounterclass, COUNT(*) AS total_encounters FROM encounters GROUP BY encounterclass ORDER BY total_encounters DESC;
generated_sql: SELECT encounterclass, COUNT(*) AS total_encounters FROM encounters GROUP BY encounterclass ORDER BY total_encounters DESC

question: Số lượt khám theo từng năm là bao nhiêu?
expected_sql: SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM start) AS year, COUNT(*) AS total_encounters FROM encounters GROUP BY year ORDER BY year;
generated_sql: SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM start) AS year, COUNT(*) AS total_encounters FROM encounters GROUP BY year ORDER BY year

question: Top 10 bệnh hoặc chẩn đoán phổ biến nhất là gì?
expected_sql: SELECT description, COUNT(*) AS total FROM conditions GROUP BY description ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 10;
generated_sql: SELECT description, COUNT(*) AS total FROM conditions GROUP BY description ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 10

question: Có bao nhiêu bệnh nhân từng có chẩn đoán liên quan đến Diabetes?
expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT patient) AS total_patients FROM conditions WHERE description ILIKE '%diabetes%';
generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT patient) AS total_patients FROM conditions WHERE description ILIKE '%diabetes%'

question: Có bao nhiêu bệnh nhân từng có chẩn đoán liên quan đến Hypertension?
expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT patient) AS total_patients FROM conditions WHERE description ILIKE '%hypertension%';
generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT patient) AS total_patients FROM conditions WHERE description ILIKE '%hypertension%'

question: Top 10 thuốc xuất hiện nhiều nhất là gì?
expected_sql: SELECT description, COUNT(*) AS total FROM medications GROUP BY description ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 10;
generated_sql: SELECT description, COUNT(*) AS total FROM medications GROUP BY description ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 10

question: Tổng chi phí thuốc theo từng năm là bao nhiêu?
expected_sql: SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM start) AS year, SUM(totalcost) AS total_medication_cost FROM medications GROUP BY year ORDER BY year;
generated_sql: SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM start) AS year, SUM(totalcost) AS total_medication_cost FROM medications GROUP BY year ORDER BY year

question: Top 10 thủ thuật phổ biến nhất là gì?
expected_sql: SELECT description, COUNT(*) AS total FROM procedures GROUP BY description ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 10;
generated_sql: SELECT description, COUNT(*) AS total FROM procedures GROUP BY description ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 10

question: Top 10 thủ thuật có chi phí trung bình cao nhất là gì?
expected_sql: SELECT description, AVG(base_cost) AS avg_base_cost FROM procedures GROUP BY description ORDER BY avg_base_cost DESC LIMIT 10;
generated_sql: SELECT description, AVG(base_cost) AS avg_base_cost FROM procedures GROUP BY description ORDER BY avg_base_cost DESC LIMIT 10

question: Top 10 loại observation xuất hiện nhiều nhất là gì?
expected_sql: SELECT description, COUNT(*) AS total FROM observations GROUP BY description ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 10;
generated_sql: SELECT description, COUNT(*) AS total FROM observations GROUP BY description ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 10

question: Giá trị trung bình của các observation dạng số phổ biến nhất là bao nhiêu?
expected_sql: SELECT description, AVG(value::NUMERIC) AS avg_value, units FROM observations WHERE value ~ '^-?[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?$' GROUP BY description, units ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 10;
generated_sql: SELECT description, AVG(value::NUMERIC) AS avg_value, units FROM observations WHERE value ~ '^-?[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?$' GROUP BY description, units ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 10

question: Top 10 bệnh nhân có nhiều lượt khám nhất là ai?
expected_sql: SELECT patient, COUNT(*) AS total_encounters FROM encounters GROUP BY patient ORDER BY total_encounters DESC LIMIT 10;
generated_sql: SELECT patient, COUNT(*) AS total_encounters FROM encounters GROUP BY patient ORDER BY total_encounters DESC LIMIT 10

question: Top 10 bệnh nhân có nhiều chẩn đoán nhất là ai?
expected_sql: SELECT p.id, p.first_name, p.last_name, COUNT(c.code) AS total_conditions FROM patients p JOIN conditions c ON c.patient = p.id GROUP BY p.id, p.first_name, p.last_name ORDER BY total_conditions DESC LIMIT 10;
generated_sql: SELECT p.id, p.first_name, p.last_name, COUNT(c.code) AS total_conditions FROM patients p JOIN conditions c ON c.patient = p.id GROUP BY p.id, p.first_name, p.last_name ORDER BY total_conditions DESC LIMIT 10

question: Top 10 cơ sở y tế có nhiều lượt khám nhất là gì?
expected_sql: SELECT o.name AS organization_name, COUNT(*) AS total_encounters FROM encounters e JOIN organizations o ON o.id = e.organization GROUP BY o.name ORDER BY total_encounters DESC LIMIT 10;
generated_sql: SELECT o.name AS organization_name, COUNT(*) AS total_encounters FROM encounters e JOIN organizations o ON o.id = e.organization GROUP BY o.name ORDER BY total_encounters DESC LIMIT 10

question: Top 10 provider có nhiều lượt khám nhất là ai?
expected_sql: SELECT pr.name AS provider_name, COUNT(*) AS total_encounters FROM encounters e JOIN providers pr ON pr.id = e.provider GROUP BY pr.name ORDER BY total_encounters DESC LIMIT 10;
generated_sql: SELECT pr.name AS provider_name, COUNT(*) AS total_encounters FROM encounters e JOIN providers pr ON pr.id = e.provider GROUP BY pr.name ORDER BY total_encounters DESC LIMIT 10

question: Chi phí claim trung bình theo từng loại encounter là bao nhiêu?
expected_sql: SELECT encounterclass, AVG(total_claim_cost) AS avg_claim_cost FROM encounters GROUP BY encounterclass ORDER BY avg_claim_cost DESC;
generated_sql: SELECT encounterclass, AVG(total_claim_cost) AS avg_claim_cost FROM encounters GROUP BY encounterclass ORDER BY avg_claim_cost DESC

question: Tổng outstanding claim amount theo từng trạng thái claim là bao nhiêu?
expected_sql: SELECT status1, SUM(outstanding1) AS total_outstanding FROM claims GROUP BY status1 ORDER BY total_outstanding DESC;
generated_sql: SELECT status1, SUM(outstanding1) AS total_outstanding FROM claims GROUP BY status1 ORDER BY total_outstanding DESC
